LanguageData.ARA_Huge_Weapon_Category.description: This weapon is extremely large, only those massive Arachnids (larger than 2.0) can use this weapon.
LanguageData.ARA_Huge_Weapon_Category.label: Large Weapon Category label
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Category.description: This weapon system causes not only conventional damage but also other effects.
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Category.label: Special Weapon Organs
